name: every supported render mapping declares the native config flag used to inject the emitted config
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'bad=[]; YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"].each{|k,v| r=v["render"]; next unless r; next if r["supported"]==false; ok=(r["flag"] && r["file"] && r["fmt"]) || (r["method"]=="cli" && r["map"]); bad<<k unless ok}; STDERR.puts("incomplete_render=#{bad.inspect}"); exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo render-tools-declare-flag 1>&2
